name: online_tutors_db
description: REST API for an online tutors platform built with Express, Sequelize and PostgreSQL.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check app/models/index.js && node --check app/controllers/users.controller.js && node --check app/controllers/subjects.controller.js && node --check app/controllers/lessons.controller.js && node --check app/controllers/reviews.controller.js && node --check app/controllers/tutor_subject.controller.js && node --check app/routes/users.routes.js && node --check app/routes/subject.routes.js && node --check app/routes/lesson.routes.js && node --check app/routes/review.routes.js && node --check app/routes/tutor_subject.routes.js
